text:
- Update to 2.75
- Fix the location printed post install, it should be PREFIX, not LOCALBASE

Removed file(s):
- files/patch-platform__FreeBSD__platform.h
- files/patch-platform__FreeBSD__sm_mem.c
- files/patch-platform__FreeBSD__sm_pf.c
- files/patch-sm_io.c


The symon protocol has changed, therefore I'd like to put a note into
/usr/ports/UPDATING


Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
